word: G1168 - δειλιάω - deiliáō - di-lee-ah'-o - Be afraid

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δειλιάω

- Transliteration: Deiliao

- Phonetic: di-lee-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to be timid, fearful

- Origin: from G1167

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1167; to be timid: - be afraid.
